title: Hemorrhoid symptoms

red_flags.text: Supports disease-specific history, bowel habits, bleeding, prolapse, thrombosis, prior interventions, and clinician-performed focused examination.
red_flags.rationale: The exact ASCRS evaluation section supports bowel habits, bleeding, prolapse, discomfort, thrombosis, hygiene, prior interventions, duration, impact, and clinician-performed focused examination without confirming haemorrhoids.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports disease-specific history, bowel habits, bleeding, prolapse, thrombosis, prior interventions, and clinician-performed focused examination.

source.title: The American Society of Colon and Rectal Surgeons Clinical Practice Guidelines for the Management of Hemorrhoids

referral.text: Supports documentation of clinician-reviewed prior treatment, outcomes, complications, and entered follow-up decisions without creating treatment advice.
referral.rationale: The exact follow-up section supports documenting prior treatment, outcomes, complications, patient questions, clinician-entered discussion, and arranged follow-up without generating fibre, medicine, procedure, surgery, or referral advice.
referral.evidence_extract: Supports documentation of clinician-reviewed prior treatment, outcomes, complications, and entered follow-up decisions without creating treatment advice.

source.title: The American Society of Colon and Rectal Surgeons Clinical Practice Guidelines for the Management of Hemorrhoids

source_limitations: Bleeding amount, bowel pattern, pregnancy, consent, chaperone, examination, diagnosis, anaemia, tests, treatment, procedure, referral, urgency, and interval remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.

All previously supported GP legacy-item mappings were conservatively removed because exact item identity, direct support, and item-specific applicability were not independently established under the fail-closed contract.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
